feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: जानिए कौन हैं यह IAS जिसकी राजस्थान की पारम्परिक वेशभूषा में तस्वीर हो रही वायरल

link.title: जानिए कौन हैं यह IAS जिसकी राजस्थान की पारम्परिक वेशभूषा में तस्वीर हो रही वायरल

entry.content: सीकर। सोशल मीडिया प्लेटफॉर्म पर कब किसकी तस्वीर वायरल हो जाए कुछ कह नहीं सकते हैं। एक बड़ी ही प्यारी तस्वीर भी इन दिनों सुर्खियों में है। तस्वीर में राजस्थानी वेशभूषा में एक महिला नवजात को गोद में लिए बैठी है। फोटो के साथ ही कैप्शन लिखा है ‘आईएएस मोनिका यादव गांव लिसाड़िया श्रीमाधोपुर की लाडली। सादगी भरा चित्र पहली बार किसी आईएएस का। जय हिंद जय भारत।’ सोशल मीडिया पर यह तस्वीर जमकर शेयर की जा रही है। यूजर्स इन्हें बच्चे के जन्म पर बधाइयां भी दे रहे हैं। इस बीच आइए जानते हैं कि आखिर कौन है यह आईएएस मोनिका यादव।
entry.summary: सीकर। सोशल मीडिया प्लेटफॉर्म पर कब किसकी तस्वीर वायरल हो जाए कुछ कह नहीं सकते हैं। एक बड़ी ही प्यारी तस्वीर भी इन दिनों सुर्खियों में है। तस्वीर में राजस्थानी वेशभूषा में एक महिला नवजात को गोद में लिए बैठी है। फोटो के साथ ही कैप्शन लिखा है ‘आईएएस मोनिका यादव गांव लिसाड़िया श्रीमाधोपुर की लाडली। सादगी भरा चित्र पहली बार किसी आईएएस का। जय हिंद जय भारत।’ सोशल मीडिया पर यह तस्वीर जमकर शेयर की जा रही है। यूजर्स इन्हें बच्चे के जन्म पर बधाइयां भी दे रहे हैं। इस बीच आइए जानते हैं कि आखिर कौन है यह आईएएस मोनिका यादव।

entry.title: Marchés couverts : le port du masque est-il respecté ?

link.title: Marchés couverts : le port du masque est-il respecté ?

entry.content:
L’obligation de port du masque dans les lieux clos est effective depuis lundi 20 juillet, mais est-elle vraiment respectée ? Illustration sur un marché couvert de Toulouse en Haute-Garonne.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: L’obligation de port du masque dans les lieux clos est effective depuis lundi 20 juillet, mais est-elle vraiment respectée ? Illustration sur un marché couvert de Toulouse en Haute-Garonne. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Kingsley’s Bar and Pizzas

link.title: Kingsley’s Bar and Pizzas

entry.content: Kingsley’s nightclub cannot reopen as a nightclub, so it will reopen as a bar with a new beer garden. Owner Steve Kingsley, 71, is partnering with Gianni from Circolo Pizzeria to allow bar partons to order pizzas directly to their tables.
entry.summary: Kingsley’s nightclub cannot reopen as a nightclub, so it will reopen as a bar with a new beer garden. Owner Steve Kingsley, 71, is partnering with Gianni from Circolo Pizzeria to allow bar partons to order pizzas directly to their tables.

entry.title: 12-year-old murdered after kidnapping Gorakhpur

link.title: 12-year-old murdered after kidnapping Gorakhpur

entry.content:
The son of a grocer is kidnapped and murdered in the Pipraich police station area of Gorakhpur in UP. The body of abducted child Balaram was found on Monday near Kewatahia drain of Tinconia No-2 in Pipraich area.
#Kidnapping #GorakhPur #UPCrime
entry.summary: The son of a grocer is kidnapped and murdered in the Pipraich police station area of Gorakhpur in UP. The body of abducted child Balaram was found on Monday near Kewatahia drain of Tinconia No-2 in Pipraich area. #Kidnapping #GorakhPur #UPCrime

entry.title: Bayern - Flick : ‘Tolisso est un grand joueur’

link.title: Bayern - Flick : ‘Tolisso est un grand joueur’

entry.content: L’entraîneur du Bayern Munich, Hansi Flick, donnait une conférence de presse ce dimanche, avant le match amical contre l’OM vendredi prochain. Il est revenu sur l’adaptation de Leroy Sané et sur les progrès physiques de Corentin Tolisso.
entry.summary: L’entraîneur du Bayern Munich, Hansi Flick, donnait une conférence de presse ce dimanche, avant le match amical contre l’OM vendredi prochain. Il est revenu sur l’adaptation de Leroy Sané et sur les progrès physiques de Corentin Tolisso.

entry.title: Par-Impar: La maldición de las películas hermanas

link.title: Par-Impar: La maldición de las películas hermanas

entry.content: Juanma González y Dani Palacios comentan películas de temática similar estrenadas casi al tiempo. Porque en Hollywood también se copian las ideas.

link.title: Frontline Mexico: The Fight Against COVID-19 Featured Documentary

entry.content: Mexico has one of the world’s highest coronavirus death tolls. Is the country’s unorthodox strategy to blame?

entry.title: Coronavirus : les fêtes de familles devenues nouveaux foyers épidémiques.

link.title: Coronavirus : les fêtes de familles devenues nouveaux foyers épidémiques.

entry.content:
La reprise de l’épidémie en Bretagne et ailleurs en France serait due au relâchement notamment lors de rassemblements familiaux. Les autorités exhortent ainsi les Français à être particulièrement vigilants et ce même avec les cousins, parents et grands-parents et recommandent le port du masque en toutes circonstances. 
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: La reprise de l’épidémie en Bretagne et ailleurs en France serait due au relâchement notamment lors de rassemblements familiaux. Les autorités exhortent ainsi les Français à être particulièrement vigilants et ce même avec les cousins, parents et grands-parents et recommandent le port du masque en toutes circonstances. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Review: Why Korean Celebs Love The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip Preview Eye PREVIEW

link.title: Review: Why Korean Celebs Love The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip Preview Eye PREVIEW

entry.content:
If you’ve been tuning into It’s Okay To Not Be Okay or have been following K-culture in general, then you might’ve noticed that there’s a cool new smartphone Korean celebs are lusting over. The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip isn’t like any other touch screen phone you’ve seen or experienced. It’s completely foldable screen makes it a jaw-dropping technological innovation, while it’s sleek and pocket-sized design is undeniably stylish. No wonder it’s Seo Ye Ji’s phone of choice in IOTNBO.
In Korea, the Z Flips endorsers are no other than chart-topping K-pop group BTS, and the boys have actually tried to order food delivery with the phone on their variety show Run BTS! Locally, Catriona Gray seems to be the phone’s official ambassador since she’s been posting quite a lot of Instagram photos with it as of late.
If you’re curious to how this cool flip phone fares–we got to try out the Z flip and experience all its cool features. Especially, its ultra HD front and rear camera that we all know is a deal breaker for fashion lovers. Watch the short video below for our quick review!
entry.summary: If you’ve been tuning into It’s Okay To Not Be Okay or have been following K-culture in general, then you might’ve noticed that there’s a cool new smartphone Korean celebs are lusting over. The Samsung Galaxy Z Flip isn’t like any other touch screen phone you’ve seen or experienced. It’s completely foldable screen makes it a jaw-dropping technological innovation, while it’s sleek and pocket-sized design is undeniably stylish. No wonder it’s Seo Ye Ji’s phone of choice in IOTNBO. In Korea, the Z Flips endorsers are no other than chart-topping K-pop group BTS, and the boys have actually tried to order food delivery with the phone on their variety show Run BTS! Locally, Catriona Gray seems to be the phone’s official ambassador since she’s been posting quite a lot of Instagram photos with it as of late. If you’re curious to how this cool flip phone fares–we got to try out the Z flip and experience all its cool features. Especially, its ultra HD front and rear camera that we all know is a deal breaker for fashion lovers. Watch the short video below for our quick review!

entry.title: India China Tension: Aksai Chin में चीन के 50 हजार जवान, भारत ने तैनात किए T90 Tank वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: India China Tension: Aksai Chin में चीन के 50 हजार जवान, भारत ने तैनात किए T90 Tank वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
India China Tension: 50 thousand Chinese soldiers in Aksai Chin, India deploys T90 tanks. No one knows when the ongoing conflict between India and China will end completely. Amidst the confrontation, India has deployed its heaviest T-90 tank in Daulat Beg Oldi, Ladakh to respond to any Chinese action.
भारत और चीन के बीच जारी टकराव कब पूरी तरह से खत्‍म होगा कोई नहीं जानता है. टकराव के बीच ही भारत ने अपने सबसे भारी टी-90 टैंक को लद्दाख के दौलत बेग ओल्‍डी में चीन की किसी भी हरकत का जवाब देने के लिए तैनात कर दिया है.
#IndiaChinaTension #AksaiChin #China
entry.summary: India China Tension: 50 thousand Chinese soldiers in Aksai Chin, India deploys T90 tanks. No one knows when the ongoing conflict between India and China will end completely. Amidst the confrontation, India has deployed its heaviest T-90 tank in Daulat Beg Oldi, Ladakh to respond to any Chinese action. भारत और चीन के बीच जारी टकराव कब पूरी तरह से खत्‍म होगा कोई नहीं जानता है. टकराव के बीच ही भारत ने अपने सबसे भारी टी-90 टैंक को लद्दाख के दौलत बेग ओल्‍डी में चीन की किसी भी हरकत का जवाब देने के लिए तैनात कर दिया है. #IndiaChinaTension #AksaiChin #China

entry.title: Torcy : un agent de sécurité agressé au couteau

link.title: Torcy : un agent de sécurité agressé au couteau

entry.content:
Mardi 21 juillet, un vigile de l’île de loisirs de Vaires-Torcy a été agressé par des jeunes après leur avoir demandé de quitter les lieux.
Il est 21 heures lorsqu’un agent remarque un groupe de jeunes assis sur la plage alors que la base de loisirs est fermée depuis deux heures. Le vigile a été frappé et agressé avec un couteau. Blessé au flanc et à la tête, il a obtenu 21 jours d’arrêt de travail.
Le directeur reconnaît une faille dans la sécurité du site. La direction de la base de loisirs a déjà été confrontée à des incivilités.
Il y a deux semaines un groupe d’adolescents s’est baignée dans une zone non surveillée. L’un deux, âgé de 15 ans, s’est noyé.
entry.summary: Mardi 21 juillet, un vigile de l’île de loisirs de Vaires-Torcy a été agressé par des jeunes après leur avoir demandé de quitter les lieux. Il est 21 heures lorsqu’un agent remarque un groupe de jeunes assis sur la plage alors que la base de loisirs est fermée depuis deux heures. Le vigile a été frappé et agressé avec un couteau. Blessé au flanc et à la tête, il a obtenu 21 jours d’arrêt de travail. Le directeur reconnaît une faille dans la sécurité du site. La direction de la base de loisirs a déjà été confrontée à des incivilités. Il y a deux semaines un groupe d’adolescents s’est baignée dans une zone non surveillée. L’un deux, âgé de 15 ans, s’est noyé.

entry.title: Real Life artist

link.title: Real Life artist

entry.content:
Karina Vaile is an artist.
She has a muscle-wasting disease which, and uses her fingers, hands and sometimes her mouth to produce her art.
entry.summary: Karina Vaile is an artist. She has a muscle-wasting disease which, and uses her fingers, hands and sometimes her mouth to produce her art.

entry.title: 11 secrétaires d’État sont nommés au gouvernement, dont six nouveaux

link.title: 11 secrétaires d’État sont nommés au gouvernement, dont six nouveaux

entry.content: Le nom des 11 secrétaires d’État a été dévoilé dans un communiqué ce dimanche soir. Jean-Baptiste Lemoyne, Laurent Pietraszewski, Sophie Cluzel, Adrien Taquet et Cédric O restent à leur poste. Par ailleurs, Six nouveaux secrétaires d’État vont faire leur entrée au gouvernement.
entry.summary: Le nom des 11 secrétaires d’État a été dévoilé dans un communiqué ce dimanche soir. Jean-Baptiste Lemoyne, Laurent Pietraszewski, Sophie Cluzel, Adrien Taquet et Cédric O restent à leur poste. Par ailleurs, Six nouveaux secrétaires d’État vont faire leur entrée au gouvernement.

entry.title: Chronixx and Ricky Blaze debate aliens, riddims, and more in Would You Rather

link.title: Chronixx and Ricky Blaze debate aliens, riddims, and more in Would You Rather

entry.content:
Of course when Chronixx is in town, he has to link with Brooklyn’s own Ricky Blaze. In anticipation for whatever they’ve been cooking up, and in tandem with the release of their newest singles — Chronixx’s "COOL AS THE BREEZE/FRIDAY," and Blaze’s "Swerve" — we’re sharing a video from when both artists touched down in the FADER office to play a pre-pandemic round of Would You Rather. The episode finds them faced with some truly existential dilemmas, such as whether to move to an alien’s planet or have an alien as a roommate. Plus, they mention the one riddim they wish they had thought of themselves, and offer tips for resourcefully recording in a quiet library (go the Ying Yang Twins route).
Subscribe now for more The FADER
Read the FADER:
Follow the FADER on Twitter:
Like the FADER on Facebook:
Follow the FADER on Instagram:
entry.summary: Of course when Chronixx is in town, he has to link with Brooklyn’s own Ricky Blaze. In anticipation for whatever they’ve been cooking up, and in tandem with the release of their newest singles — Chronixx’s "COOL AS THE BREEZE/FRIDAY," and Blaze’s "Swerve" — we’re sharing a video from when both artists touched down in the FADER office to play a pre-pandemic round of Would You Rather. The episode finds them faced with some truly existential dilemmas, such as whether to move to an alien’s planet or have an alien as a roommate. Plus, they mention the one riddim they wish they had thought of themselves, and offer tips for resourcefully recording in a quiet library (go the Ying Yang Twins route). Subscribe now for more The FADER Read the FADER: Follow the FADER on Twitter: Like the FADER on Facebook: Follow the FADER on Instagram:

entry.title: GTA 5 First Person Gameplay

link.title: GTA 5 First Person Gameplay

entry.content:
Grand Theft Auto (GTA) is a series of action-adventure games created by David Jones and Mike Dailly.[2] Later titles were developed under the oversight of brothers Dan and Sam Houser, Leslie Benzies and Aaron Garbut. It is primarily developed by British development house Rockstar North (formerly DMA Design), and published by its parent company, Rockstar Games. The name of the series references the term "grand theft auto", used in the United States for motor vehicle theft.
Most games in the series are set in fictional locales modelled on cities, usually either Liberty City, Vice City or San Andreas, which are stand-ins for New York City, Miami and the state of California, respectively. The first game encompassed three fictional cities, while subsequent titles tend to emphasise a single setting. Gameplay focuses on an open world where the player can choose missions to progress an overall story, as well as engaging in side activities, all consisting of action-adventure, driving, third-person shooting, carjacking, occasional role-playing, stealth and racing elements. The series focuses on many different protagonists who attempt to rise through the ranks of the criminal underworld, although their motives for doing so vary in each game. The series also has elements of the earlier beat ‘em up games from the 16-bit era. The antagonists are commonly characters who have betrayed the protagonist or his organisation, or characters who have the most impact impeding the protagonist’s progress. Film and music veterans have voiced characters, including Ray Liotta, Dennis Hopper, Samuel L. Jackson, James Woods, Debbie Harry, Axl Rose and Peter Fonda.[3]
DMA Design began the series in 1997, with the release of the Grand Theft Auto. As of 2019, the series has eleven stand-alone games and four expansion packs. The third main title, Grand Theft Auto III, is considered a landmark game, as it brought the series to a three-dimensional (3D) setting and more immersive experience. Subsequent titles have followed and built upon the concept established in Grand Theft Auto III, and received significant acclaim. They have influenced other open-world action games, and led to the label Grand Theft Auto clone on similar games.
The series has been critically acclaimed and commercially successful, having shipped more than 280 million units with an estimated gross revenue of over $9 billion.[4][5] Making it the fourth-highest selling video game franchise of all time, behind Nintendo’s Mario and Pokémon franchises,[6] and Tetris.[7] In 2006, Grand Theft Auto was featured in a list of British design icons in the Great British Design Quest organised by the BBC and the Design Museum.[8] In 2013, The Telegraph ranked Grand Theft Auto among Britain’s most successful exports.[9] The series has also been controversial for its adult nature and violent themes.
entry.summary: Grand Theft Auto (GTA) is a series of action-adventure games created by David Jones and Mike Dailly.[2] Later titles were developed under the oversight of brothers Dan and Sam Houser, Leslie Benzies and Aaron Garbut. It is primarily developed by British development house Rockstar North (formerly DMA Design), and published by its parent company, Rockstar Games. The name of the series references the term "grand theft auto", used in the United States for motor vehicle theft. Most games in the series are set in fictional locales modelled on cities, usually either Liberty City, Vice City or San Andreas, which are stand-ins for New York City, Miami and the state of California, respectively. The first game encompassed three fictional cities, while subsequent titles tend to emphasise a single setting. Gameplay focuses on an open world where the player can choose missions to progress an overall story, as well as engaging in side activities, all consisting of action-adventure, driving, third-person shooting, carjacking, occasional role-playing, stealth and racing elements. The series focuses on many different protagonists who attempt to rise through the ranks of the criminal underworld, although their motives for doing so vary in each game. The series also has elements of the earlier beat ‘em up games from the 16-bit era. The antagonists are commonly characters who have betrayed the protagonist or his organisation, or characters who have the most impact impeding the protagonist’s progress. Film and music veterans have voiced characters, including Ray Liotta, Dennis Hopper, Samuel L. Jackson, James Woods, Debbie Harry, Axl Rose and Peter Fonda.[3] DMA Design began the series in 1997, with the release of the Grand Theft Auto. As of 2019, the series has eleven stand-alone games and four expansion packs. The third main title, Grand Theft Auto III, is considered a landmark game, as it brought the series to a three-dimensional (3D) setting and more immersive experience. Subsequent titles have followed and built upon the concept established in Grand Theft Auto III, and received significant acclaim. They have influenced other open-world action games, and led to the label Grand Theft Auto clone on similar games. The series has been critically acclaimed and commercially successful, having shipped more than 280 million units with an estimated gross revenue of over $9 billion.[4][5] Making it the fourth-highest selling video game franchise of all time, behind Nintendo’s Mario and Pokémon franchises,[6] and Tetris.[7] In 2006, Grand Theft Auto was featured in a list of British design icons in the Great British Design Quest organised by the BBC and the Design Museum.[8] In 2013, The Telegraph ranked Grand Theft Auto among Britain’s most successful exports.[9] The series has also been controversial for its adult nature and violent themes.

entry.title: Rafale விமானங்கள் இன்று இந்தியா வந்துவிடும்

link.title: Rafale விமானங்கள் இன்று இந்தியா வந்துவிடும்

entry.content:
இந்திய பாதுகாப்புத் துறையை வலிமைப்படுத்தும் ரஃபேல் போர் விமானங்கள் இன்று பிற்பகலில் ஹரியானாவின் அம்பாலா விமான படை தளத்தை வந்தடைகின்றன
First batch rafale jets will arrive today at ambala air force station
entry.summary: இந்திய பாதுகாப்புத் துறையை வலிமைப்படுத்தும் ரஃபேல் போர் விமானங்கள் இன்று பிற்பகலில் ஹரியானாவின் அம்பாலா விமான படை தளத்தை வந்தடைகின்றன First batch rafale jets will arrive today at ambala air force station
